name: Add Commit Prefix Config

tasks.title: Add CommitPrefix field to GitConfig and set default
tasks.description: Add CommitPrefix field to GitConfig and set default
tasks.body: Add a CommitPrefix string field to the GitConfig struct in internal/config/types.go with JSON tag commit_prefix. In Defaults() in internal/config/config.go, set CommitPrefix to "wolfcastle". The field should be a plain string: empty string means no prefix, any other value is used as-is. Update the validation in internal/config/validate.go if it checks GitConfig fields. Update existing tests in internal/config/ that construct GitConfig literals to include the new field so they continue to compile.
acceptance_criteria: GitConfig struct has a CommitPrefix field with json tag commit_prefix
All existing tests pass with the new field

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Add Commit Prefix Config is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Verify CommitPrefix field exists in GitConfig with correct json tag and default value in Defaults()

breadcrumbs.text: Added CommitPrefix string field to GitConfig in types.go with json tag commit_prefix. Set default to 'wolfcastle' in Defaults() in config.go. No validation changes needed since empty string is a valid value (means no prefix). All existing tests pass.

task-0001.objective: Add a CommitPrefix field to GitConfig with a default value of wolfcastle
task-0001.what_happened: Added CommitPrefix string field to GitConfig struct in internal/config/types.go, positioned between CommitState and CommitMessageFormat for logical grouping. Set default to 'wolfcastle' in Defaults() in internal/config/config.go. Reviewed validate.go and confirmed no validation update needed: empty string is semantically valid (means no prefix), and any non-empty string is used as-is.
went_well: Minimal two-file change, no test breakage since all tests use Defaults() rather than constructing GitConfig literals
action_items: Downstream tasks should wire CommitPrefix into the commit message formatting logic where CommitMessageFormat is consumed
